Supervisory Librarian (Research Specialist) (GS-15)

  • Opening Date: February 11, 2026
  • Closing Date: March 10, 2026
  • Vacancy Number: VAR003279
  • Grade: GS-15
  • Minimum Salary: $169,279.00 per year
  • Maximum Salary: $197,200.00 per year
  • Series: 1410
  • Availability: Library Employees Only
  • Telework Eligibility: Hybrid

The Congressional Research Service (CRS) seeks a Supervisory Librarian to serve as Supervisory Librarian (Research Specialist) of the Research and Library Services (RLS) Section within the Domestic Social Policy (DSP) division.

The Section works closely with analysts in DSP, the CRS division that responds to requests for public policy analysis on issues related to education, labor, children and families, poverty, income security, retirement, healthcare, and other domestic social policy topics.
